scripts.css:watch: bash -c 'last=""; while true; do current=$(find ERP -name "*.html" -o -name "*.py" -o -path "*/static/src/input.css" | xargs stat -c "%Y %n" | sort | md5sum); if [ "$current" != "$last" ]; then echo "Change detected, rebuilding..."; npm run css:build && echo "CSS rebuilt at $(date)"; last="$current"; fi; sleep 1; done'
